usage.title: How to Restore Your Videos
usage.description: Three simple steps to enhance your video quality with SeedVR2:

items.title: Upload Your Video
items.description: Upload any video file - old footage, compressed videos, or AIGC content. We support all common formats.

items.title: Choose Restoration Mode
items.description: Select from upscaling, denoising, or full enhancement. Our AI automatically optimizes settings for best results.

items.title: Download Enhanced Video
items.description: Get your restored video in minutes. Download in high quality and share anywhere.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Everything you need to know about SeedVR2
faq.tip: Still have questions? Contact Support

items.question: What video formats does SeedVR2 support?
items.answer: SeedVR2 supports all major video formats including MP4, WebM, AVI, MOV, and MKV. You can upload videos in any of these formats and export to your preferred format. We also support various codecs like H.264, H.265, VP9, and ProRes.

items.question: How long does the restoration process take?
items.answer: Processing time depends on video length and resolution. Typically, a 5-minute 1080p video takes about 3-5 minutes to upscale to 4K. Longer videos may take proportionally more time, but our AI is optimized for speed without compromising quality.

items.question: Is my video data safe and private?
items.answer: Absolutely. All video processing happens in a secure, encrypted environment. We never store your videos permanently or share them with third parties. You can also choose local processing for complete data control. Videos are automatically deleted after 24 hours.

items.question: What makes SeedVR2 different from other upscalers?
items.answer: SeedVR2 uses advanced neural networks specifically trained on video restoration. Unlike basic upscalers, we intelligently remove noise, fix compression artifacts, enhance details, and reconstruct missing information. Our AI understands motion, temporal consistency, and video-specific challenges.

items.question: Can I process multiple videos at once?
items.answer: Yes! Pro and Business plans include batch processing capabilities. You can queue multiple videos and process them simultaneously, saving significant time for large projects. Free tier users can process one video at a time.

items.question: Do I need technical knowledge to use SeedVR2?
items.answer: Not at all! SeedVR2 is designed to be user-friendly for everyone. Simply upload your video, adjust settings if needed (or use our smart Auto mode), and click Start. The AI handles all the complex restoration work automatically.

items.question: What is the maximum file size I can upload?
items.answer: Free users can upload videos up to 500 MB. Pro users get 5 GB per video, and Business plan has no file size limits. For very large files, we recommend using our desktop app which supports local processing.

items.question: Can I get a refund if I'm not satisfied?
items.answer: Yes, we offer a 14-day money-back guarantee for all paid plans. If you're not completely satisfied with the results, contact our support team for a full refund, no questions asked.
